title: Give instructions in order
subtitle: Explain steps simply.
overview: A2 Bridge turns short A1 sentences into connected, useful English. Read aloud, understand the Chinese, then make your own sentence.

sections.title: A2 bridge focus
rows: First, open the app. Then, choose the lesson.
首先，打开应用。然后，选择课程。
After that, press the play button.
How do I listen to the lesson?
First, open the lesson. Then, press play.
首先打开课程。然后按播放。

items.en: First, open the app. Then, choose the lesson.
items.zh: 首先，打开应用。然后，选择课程。

items.en: After that, press the play button.
How do I listen to the lesson?
First, open the lesson. Then, press play.
items.zh: 首先打开课程。然后按播放。

items.en: This sentence helps me speak a little longer.
items.zh: 这个句子帮助我说得稍微长一点。

items.en: I can change the details and make it true for my life.
items.zh: 我可以改变细节，让它符合我的真实生活。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: How do I listen to the lesson?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: First, open the lesson. Then, press play.
lines.zh: 首先打开课程。然后按播放。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you add one more detail?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: After that, press the play button.

items.en: First, open the app. Then, choose the lesson.
items.zh: 首先，打开应用。然后，选择课程。

items.en: After that, press the play button.
Now say the same idea with your own real details.
items.zh: 现在用你自己的真实细节说同一个意思。

items.en: Repeat it until it feels clear and natural.
items.zh: 重复它，直到感觉清楚又自然。
